query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of a tall light pole with an intensely bright lamp mounted at the top, positioned above a multi-story building. Several human figures appear as dark silhouettes standing on an upper-level exterior walkway near a row of illuminated windows. Horizontal railings and additional architectural elements are partially visible in the lower portion of the frame, and the background consists of a dark blue night sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tilted nighttime snapshot with an amateur, casual composition capturing an intensely bright overhead floodlight rendered with extreme overexposure, sending luminous streaks diagonally across the frame in a manner resembling light leaks. The surrounding building and silhouetted figures on the upper walkway dissolve into crushed shadows and smeared, indistinct textures with almost no surface detail. The off-kilter framing and extreme contrast between the blinding light source and oppressive darkness evoke an uneasy, distressed atmosphere.
